title: Status++
description: Client-side Ranks, that depend on your experience level
body:
![status_icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93dd768bbe8f95052670fc6018698e29b431e568.png)
A lightweight Minecraft client mod that shows your **player rank, XP progress**, and adds a little flair to your HUD. Collect XP, level up, and see your rank grow from **None** to **Supreme**.
**Features:** - Animated HUD showing rank and XP bar - Rank icons above your head - Localized for multiple languages - Fully client-side, lightweight **Dependences:** - Fabric API ------------------------------------------------ ![rank_texture13](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0142dde725aff34c0c3e24019fb29cfcd63cebe0.png)![rank_texture14](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c89443a8b746b04f113ee630e1432241050ac320.png)![rank_texture12](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06a938e5ca1e8889b2a7ece9c4551ad94e275e65.png)![rank_texture10](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6e5fccbd3ece679d5b7284054bc4e69baffa38b.png)![rank_texture09](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50eed337e5c4e9c13c2edae2dd1c7edd40775475.png)![rank_texture08](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50383f3e62491e455a5f06a59665e11487335a9b.png)![rank_texture05](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecdbb053fc9626cf0a675573bdd00665d30ce2bd.png)![rank_texture04](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/012625888aae971aea0304d598a38afebe7d8301.png)
